items.title: The teams seeing the biggest wins from AI are completely changing how they work, not spee…
items.title_zh: 从人工智能中获得最大胜利的团队正在彻底改变他们的工作方式，而不是速度……
items.description: The teams seeing the biggest wins from AI are completely changing how they work, not speeding up what they already do. What steps can you delete, what handoffs go away, what can an agent just own end to end. Great to see Salesforce go this…
items.description_zh: 从人工智能中获得最大胜利的团队正在彻底改变他们的工作方式，而不是加快他们已经做的事情。您可以删除哪些步骤，取消哪些交接，座席可以端到端地拥有哪些内容。很高兴看到 Salesforce 这样做……

items.title: Quality went up alongside output.
items.title_zh: 质量随着产量的提高而提高。
items.description: Quality went up alongside output. Even with more PRs shipping, total incidents dropped 5%. They built security guardrails and quality standards into the agentic workflow itself. Productivity vs quality is sometimes framed as a tradeoff. Th…
items.description_zh: 质量随着产量的提高而提高。即使发送了更多 PR，事件总数仍下降了 5%。他们在代理工作流程本身中构建了安全护栏和质量标准。生产力与质量有时被视为一种权衡。特…

items.title: Salesforce published a detailed writeup on going agentic with Claude Code.
items.title_zh: Salesforce 发布了一篇关于使用 Claude Code 进行代理的详细文章。
items.description: Salesforce published a detailed writeup on going agentic with Claude Code. A couple things jumped out. A migration they'd scoped at 231 days shipped in 13. One PR delivered 21 endpoints at 100% test coverage.
items.description_zh: Salesforce 发布了一篇关于使用 Claude Code 进行代理的详细文章。有几件事跳了出来。他们定范围为 231 天的迁移在 13 天内交付。一个 PR 以 100% 的测试覆盖率交付了 21 个端点。

items.title: I looked at a number today on a codex dashboard and it made me happy.
items.title_zh: 今天我在 Codex 仪表板上看到了一个数字，这让我很高兴。
items.description: I looked at a number today on a codex dashboard and it made me happy. More news about the number soon. 👀 Thanks to everyone who keeps adopting codex. We are still early. So early.
items.description_zh: 今天我在 Codex 仪表板上看到了一个数字，这让我很高兴。有关该号码的更多消息很快就会公布。 👀 感谢所有不断采用 Codex 的人。我们还早。这么早。

items.title: Do you still trust benchmarks or do you just listen to your friends?
items.title_zh: 您仍然相信基准还是只听朋友的？

items.description_zh: 您仍然相信基准还是只听朋友的？是什么促使您尝试新模式？

items.title: The app layer couldn’t get a better advertisement than a company spending $500M to build…
items.title_zh: 对于应用程序层来说，没有比一家公司花费 5 亿美元打造的广告更好的了……
items.description: The app layer couldn’t get a better advertisement than a company spending $500M to build their own version of it. Obviously lots of nuance here that can’t be captured in the headline, but this should make you very bullish on software. http…
items.description_zh: 对于应用程序层来说，没有比一家公司花费 5 亿美元构建自己的版本更好的广告了。显然，这里有很多细微差别无法在标题中体现出来，但这应该让您非常看好软件。 http…

items.title: A founder kept saying "if only we had money we'd do X." Money is not the fire.
items.title_zh: 一位创始人一直说“只要我们有钱，我们就会做X”。钱不是火。
items.description: A founder kept saying "if only we had money we'd do X." Money is not the fire. Money is gasoline you pour on a fire that already exists. You don't have a funding problem. You have a "people don't want it yet" problem. Go make the first fir…
items.description_zh: 一位创始人一直说“只要我们有钱，我们就会做X”。钱不是火。金钱是你浇在已经存在的火上的汽油。你没有资金问题。你有一个“人们还不想要它”的问题。去做第一个……

items.description: Virtue signalers who don’t actually care about the outcomes for the students of the UC system really should have had no part in the UC Regents Unfortunately they have damaged beautiful institution and their names should be remembered for i…
